response.original_title: Start Smart: Fire Safety and You
response.overview: What can you do to be ready in case there is a fire in your home?  What do you need to remember to escape from a burning building?  What can you do to prevent fires from starting in your home?  What is the fire triangle?  What should you do if you spot outdoor fire hazards?  The answers to these questions are covered in depth with detailed graphics, diagrams and exciting video.  On-screen, multiple-choice reviews at the end of each segment reinforce important concepts and make learning fun.
response.title: Start Smart: Fire Safety and You
